releaseNotes:
e-PolyPariksha HP update:
- Admin sign-in now uses email OTP verification.
- Admin registration now verifies the email account with OTP.
- Making another admin primary now requires email OTP verification.
- New student accounts can use date of birth as the default password in DDMMYYYY format.
- Update checks now use the app build number so the latest app does not keep asking to update.
